journal_entry.reason: Conversion of preferred shares to common shares at carrying value; equity restructuring with no gain or loss

output.asset_increase_reason: No assets are involved in this equity conversion transaction.
output.dividend_increase_reason: No dividends or owner withdrawals are involved in this equity conversion.
output.expense_increase_reason: Equity conversions are not expenses; they are reclassifications within equity.
output.liability_decrease_reason: No liabilities are involved in this equity-to-equity conversion.
output.equity_decrease_reason: Preferred shares equity account decreases by $100 (carrying value) as 50 preferred shares are converted out.
